title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using Cursor to accelerate software delivery, with adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster. The company projects 40% more capabilities delivery in 2026 through AI-assisted development.
